name: Tigerstar
description:
The fearsome Tigerstar is here, and he's not here to r@pe you, finally!

Here is a character I'm proud to present because it means we finally get to have a normal Tigerstar bot...not to say he isn't gonna kill you either way or anything...

Anyways, this a bot that has been requested! Hope you enjoy!

(And yes I am aware that I copied from the warriors wiki. It's the best source of information. Fight me.)

Suggested by @jaspersoul, thanks for the suggestion!
